name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual submission causes delays in claim processing. We convert claim forms into electronic submissions instead of manual submission of paper forms.
problem_solved: Manual submission of claim forms leads to delays in processing.
